episodes.title: Rep. Stansbury: We interviewed Epstein’s assistant Lesley Groff - here’s what happened
episodes.description:
Everything about this case is strange. Especially the revelation that even in death, Epstein is still paying the legal fees of witnesses in this case—including his assistant Lesley Groff, who we interviewed in @OversightDems this week.  

We know paying legal fees was one of the ways he exercised control and evaded justice…and it continues today even in death.

episodes.title: Rep. Stansbury: Turning the Epstein Files into Epstein Trials
episodes.description: It’s time to release the files. And, to hold every single perpetrator out there accountable. Period. #EpsteinFilesToEpsteinTrials

episodes.title: Rep. Stansbury: How did Epstein abuse the system in West Palm Beach? ￼
episodes.description: We’re here in West Palm Beach—and I wanted to share my thoughts ahead of tomorrow’s field hearing with Epstein Survivors. Here Epstein created a system to not only abuse women and girls—but the system itself. And, it was against a backdrop of wealth, power, and prestige—filled with robber baron ballrooms, private clubs, and yachts. The same world as the President himself. ⬆️

episodes.title: Rep. Stansbury: Why are Epstein's associates still covering for his crimes?
episodes.description: Even in death—those around Epstein continue to cover for his crimes. This silence is not accidental. This is how systems protect those in power.  That is why we must pursue the truth and accountability at every turn!

episodes.title: 🚨 Breaking News in Epstein Case 🚨
episodes.description:
The New Mexico Legislature has passed HR1 tonight to convene a Truth Commission and investigate Epstein’s crimes in NM, including at Zorro Ranch, led by State House Reps. Andrea Romero and Marianna Anaya. 

The committee will hold its first meeting TOMORROW, Feb. 17 at 10:30am at the State Capitol, Room 315 and will be webcast at www.nmlegis.gov.  NM demands accountability.

episodes.title: Rep. Stansbury: Latest on Ghislaine Maxwell Deposition
episodes.description:
This morning, Ghislaine Maxwell blanket pleaded the 5th during her deposition in the Epstein case. What’s the message? She seems to be making it clear to Donald Trump that he can buy her silence with clemency.

Not on our watch. Here is the latest.

episodes.title: Rep. Stansbury: Release the Epstein files
episodes.description: Is whatever is in the files that bad? Release. The. Epstein. Files.
